tokenPlaceholder: Optional, leave empty for no auth
noProfiles: No gateways yet. Click to add.
connectionHttpOnlyWarn: HTTP OK but WebSocket failed — logs/dashboard may not work
systemEventDesc: Push a system event to the Gateway
confirmKill: Force kill the gateway process? This may cause data loss.
watchdogIntervalInvalid: Interval must be between 5 and 300 seconds
watchdogMaxFailsInvalid: Max fails must be between 1 and 20
watchdogBackoffInvalid: Backoff cap must be between 1 and 6000 seconds
watchdogGraceInvalid: Restart grace must be between 10 and 600 seconds
channelLogoutConfirm: Logout from this channel? You will need to re-authenticate.
serviceDesc: Run gateway as an OS-level service for auto-start on boot
serviceWatchdogInactive: Inactive — enable Health Check to activate
daemonRemoteHint: Remote gateways are already running as services. Daemon management is only available for local gateways.
wsDisconnectedHint: Gateway port is reachable but the WebSocket data channel is not established. Logs and dashboard data will be unavailable. Please check: 1) Token/secret is correct 2) Remote firewall allows WebSocket connections 3) No reverse proxy is blocking WebSocket upgrade
wdRemoteHint: Remote mode: watchdog will only reconnect, never restart the remote gateway.
lifecycleNotifyShutdownHint: Send notification when gateway shuts down
secretsReloadDesc: Reload .env and vault secrets without restarting the gateway

dreams.title: Memory Dreaming
dreams.desc: Automatic memory consolidation — promotes short-term recalls into durable long-term memory
dreams.diaryEmpty: No dream diary found. Dreams will appear here after the first dreaming sweep.
dreams.enableConfirmMessage: Enable the memory dreaming system now? This will start automatic memory consolidation tasks.
dreams.disableConfirmMessage: Disable the memory dreaming system now? This will stop automatic memory consolidation tasks.
dreams.backfillConfirmMessage: Replay historical daily notes into Dreams and persistent memory? This may take a while.
dreams.resetDiaryConfirmMessage: This will clear all dream diary entries. Promoted long-term memories will not be affected. Continue?
dreams.resetGroundedConfirmMessage: This will clear all grounded short-term memory entries. Promoted long-term memories will not be affected. Continue?
dreams.resetGroundedFailed: Failed to reset grounded short-term memory

wsDisconnectedTip: WebSocket data channel disconnected — click for details
wsDisconnectedDesc: Real-time logs, events, and chat will not work until the WebSocket connection is restored.
wsBeginnerHint: WS connects ClawDeckX to the gateway for real-time data. Check that the gateway is running, token is correct, and no firewall blocks the port.
wdRestartingDesc: Watchdog triggered a restart due to consecutive health check failures
wdGraceDesc: Health checks paused, waiting for gateway to stabilize after restart
nfySendingDesc: Dispatching anomaly alert to configured channels
nfyReadyDesc: Will notify when anomaly triggers configured events
wsDiagRefused: Gateway port is not listening. Check if the gateway process is running and the port is correct.
wsDiagForceClosed: Connection rejected by remote host. Check token, TLS/SSL settings, or firewall/proxy configuration.
wsDiagTimeout: Connection timed out. The gateway may be overloaded, or a firewall/NAT is blocking the connection.
wsDiagDns: DNS resolution failed. Check hostname spelling and network DNS settings.
wsDiagTls: TLS/SSL certificate error. Verify the gateway SSL configuration or switch to non-TLS connection.
wsDiagAuth: Authentication failed. Verify the gateway token in profile settings.
wsDiagNetwork: Network unreachable. Check your network connection and gateway host address.
probeDesc: Process, port and HTTP readiness probes
probeHttpLive: Port is reachable but /health is not healthy
probeHttpReady: Gateway is alive but not ready

optimize.title: Gateway Optimization
optimize.subtitle: Tune OpenClaw for speed, cost & stability
optimize.quickOptimizeDesc: Apply recommended settings across all steps
optimize.configErrorHint: Make sure OpenClaw config path is set correctly.
optimize.confirmRestart: Changes take effect after gateway restart.
optimize.applied: Plugin optimization applied. Restart gateway to take effect.
optimize.restartHint: Changes take effect after gateway restart. Core plugins (anthropic, openai, etc.) are not shown — they load on-demand and do not affect startup time.
optimize.modelPricingDesc: Fetches pricing from OpenRouter & LiteLLM on startup (60s timeout each). Disable if not using cost tracking or if network is restricted.
optimize.optimizePluginDescBonjour: Advertise gateway over mDNS/Bonjour on LAN. Disable if not using mobile app pairing.
optimize.optimizePluginDescBrowser: Provides browser automation tools for agents.
optimize.optimizePluginDescDevicePair: Generate setup codes and approve device pairing requests.
optimize.optimizePluginDescPhoneControl: Arm/disarm high-risk phone commands (camera, screen, writes).
optimize.optimizePluginDescAcpx: Embedded ACP runtime for IDE integrations (VS Code, Zed, etc.).
optimize.optimizePluginDescPrometheus: Export Prometheus metrics for monitoring. Disable if not using Prometheus.
optimize.contextHint: Long conversations become slow because context grows linearly. Context pruning removes stale tool results; compaction summarizes history to stay within token limits.
optimize.compactionModeHint: "safeguard" applies stricter guardrails to preserve recent context during summarization.
optimize.compactionNotifyHint: Show brief notices when compaction starts and completes.
optimize.maxConcurrentHint: Max concurrent agent runs across all conversations. Default: 1 (sequential).
optimize.thinkingHint: Higher thinking = better reasoning but slower & more tokens. "adaptive" lets the model decide.
optimize.updateCheckDesc: Check for new OpenClaw versions when gateway starts. Disable to speed up startup.
optimize.redactDesc: Redact sensitive tokens (API keys, secrets) from tool output in logs. "tools" is recommended for security.
optimize.leanModeDesc: Drop heavyweight default tools from system prompt for small local models (≤14B). Saves ~3KB of prompt space.
optimize.securityHint: Control what the AI agent can execute on your system. These settings are critical for preventing unintended actions.
optimize.execSecurityHint: "deny" blocks all exec. "allowlist" permits only approved commands. "full" allows everything (dangerous).
optimize.execAskHint: "on-miss" asks for approval only when a command is not in the allowlist. "always" asks every time.
optimize.execStrictInlineHint: Require approval for python -c, node -e, etc. Prevents allowlist bypass via inline code.
optimize.fsWorkspaceHint: Limit read/write/edit to the agent workspace directory. Prevents access to system files.
optimize.loopDetectionHint: Detect and block repetitive tool-call loops. Prevents infinite cycles that waste tokens.
optimize.compactionTruncateHint: Rotate transcript file after compaction to prevent unbounded growth.
optimize.contextInjectionHint: "continuation-skip" skips re-injecting AGENTS.md on follow-up turns, saving tokens on long conversations.
optimize.imageMaxDimHint: Lower values reduce token usage for image-heavy conversations.
optimize.execTimeoutHint: Auto-kill exec commands after this duration. Prevents runaway processes.
optimize.webSearchMaxHint: Fewer results = less context tokens. Default: 10, recommended: 5.
optimize.maintenanceHint: Automatic session cleanup prevents disk bloat from long-running gateway instances. Recommended for always-on deployments.
optimize.sessionMaintModeHint: "warn" only logs warnings. "enforce" auto-deletes expired sessions and enforces disk budget.
optimize.sessionDiskBudgetHint: Max disk space for session files per agent. Oldest sessions cleaned first when exceeded.
optimize.proxyHint: Configure a forward HTTP proxy for all outbound API requests. Useful for cross-border access or corporate network requirements.
optimize.proxyUrlHint: Must be HTTP (not HTTPS/SOCKS). Example: http://proxy:8080
